topStories.title: 'Capture Enemy Pilots Alive': Iran Channel Issues Reward After US Jet Downed
topStories.description: An Iranian channel announced a reward for civilians if the pilots were captured and handed over to the police and military forces.

topStories.title: US rescues one crew member of F-15E fighter jet shot down by Iran; Tehran asks for civilian help: Report
topStories.description: According to the reports, Israel is helping the US with search and rescue operation of the crew member.

topStories.title: Watch: G.K. Vasan: Tamil Nadu missed central schemes as DMK treated BJP as ‘enemy’
topStories.description: GK Vasan, president of the Tamil Maanila Congress (Moopanar), speaks about the upcoming Assembly elections in Tamil Nadu. He talks about his party’s alliance with the BJP, why the country has rejected the Congress party and that the priority of the State should be safety, especially for women.

topStories.title: Congress calls delimitation move ‘dangerous,’ says women’s law amended to grab political mileage in polls
topStories.description: Congress President Mallikarjun Kharge and LoP in Lok Sabha Rahul Gandhi to meet party colleagues and other Opposition leaders to strategise for the special session, says Jairam Ramesh, adding the move to amend women’s quota law in the middle of elections violates model code

topStories.description: Neither the US nor Israel has publicly commented on the specific strikes against medical facilities.

topStories.description: CMA CGM's vessel becomes the first French-owned ship to traverse Hormuz since the US–Israel war on Iran began.

dailyNews.title: One crew member rescued by special forces says US officials after Iran shoots down American F-15 fighter jet
dailyNews.description: Most Americans favor a swift end to US involvement in the conflict, according to a recent poll. The downing of an F-15E fighter jet in Iran led to one crew member's rescue, with ongoing concerns about potential US military personnel capture affecting public opinion.

dailyNews.description: The insurance expansion comes as a broader diplomatic push takes shape in parallel.

dailyNews.title: Who is Christopher LaNeve? Pete Hegseth's aide likely to become US' acting Army Chief of Staff
dailyNews.description: The Pentagon reportedly confirmed that George, who had more than a year left in his term, “will be retiring from his position as the 41st Chief of Staff of the Army effective immediately.”

dailyNews.title: 'Stop War': Ex-Iranian FM Urges Tehran To Negotiate With Washington
dailyNews.description: Zarif, one of the architects of the now-defunct 2015 nuclear deal, is regarded as a relative moderate within Iran's political establishment, though he holds no official post in the current government....

dailyNews.title: Honorary doctorates to politicians raises eyebrows
dailyNews.description: The two politicians are Congress MLC K. Govindaraj and B.M. Farooq, an industrialist from Mangaluru identified with the Janata Dal (Secular)

dailyNews.title: US launches search and rescue operation after its F-15E fighter jet shot down in Iran amid ongoing conflict
dailyNews.description: Iran shot down a US F-15E fighter jet, marking the first combat loss of a US jet in the ongoing conflict. A rescue operation is underway for the crew, according to an US official. The Iranian state media posted map of Iran highlighting the area where two pilots are being hunted for since morning.

dailyNews.title: Trump seeks historic $1.5 trillion for military in Congress budget request
dailyNews.description: The request for defence spending is the largest in decades and accompanies cuts to domestic programmes.

dailyNews.title: Trump seeks massive $1.5tn for defence alongside cuts in domestic spending
dailyNews.description: The president's new budget would cut non-defence spending by 10%, partly by slashing domestic programmes.

dailyNews.title: Iranian forces launch search for crew of downed US fighter jet
dailyNews.description: The Fars news agency reports Iranian military launched a search operation to locate the crew of the aircraft.

dailyNews.title: US intelligence believes Iran still has ‘significant’ missile launching capabilities as the war continues
dailyNews.description: The US and Israel's Operation Epic Fury targets Iran's missile capabilities. After 35 days of conflict, US intelligence reveals that nearly half of Iran’s missile launchers remain, contradicting earlier assertions of extensive damage.

dailyNews.title: Trump cabinet shakeup expands after Noem exit, Bondi firing — who’s under pressure next?
dailyNews.description: After ousting Noem and Bondi, Trump may target more cabinet members ahead of crucial midterm elections where slim GOP majorities are at stake.

dailyNews.title: Hegseth Says U.S. Troops Are Fighting for Jesus. The Pope Disagrees.
dailyNews.description: In sharp contrast to the Trump administration’s calls for Christian prayers for the war effort, Pope Leo XIV says military domination is “entirely foreign to the way of Jesus Christ.”

dailyNews.title: Pam Bondi Wanted a Graceful Exit. But Trump Wanted Her Gone.
dailyNews.description: Pam Bondi had a feeling her days as attorney general were numbered. But she didn’t expect President Trump to drop the curtain quite so soon.

dailyNews.title: White House reacts to F-15E fighter jet downed over Iran
dailyNews.description: White House press secretary Karoline Leavitt says President Trump has been briefed after an American fighter jet was downed in Iran. CBS News' Weijia Jiang reports.

dailyNews.title: Trump's 2027 budget asks Congress for $1.5 trillion in defense spending
dailyNews.description: President Trump's new budget proposal asks Congress for $1.5 trillion in defense spending — a 42% increase — while cutting nondefense spending by $73 billion, or 10%.

dailyNews.title: As Trump rails against NATO, secretary general heads to Washington
dailyNews.description: NATO’s secretary general is heading to the White House next week as President Donald Trump lashes out over European allies’ refusal to join the U.S. and Israel’s war with Iran.

dailyNews.title: Pam Bondi Responds After Trump Fires Her as Attorney General
dailyNews.description: President Donald Trump announced on Thursday that he has fired Pam Bondi as Attorney General and said she will be transitioning to a “new job in the private sector.” Deputy Attorney General Todd Blanche, who once served as Trump’s personal defense lawyer during his hush money trial in New York, is set to replace her as acting attorney general. NBC’s Gabe Gutierrez reports and Kristen Welker, moderator of Meet the Press, joins TODAY with analysis.

dailyNews.title: Evangelical churches who backed Trump now feel like 'collateral' in his deportation agenda
dailyNews.description: Amid ICE arrests and detentions, attendance has dropped and churches have closed. 'You're deporting the future of American Christianity,' a Latino evangelical leader said.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says Colombia Will Accept Deportees, Ending Tariff Standoff
dailyNews.description: The president has made immigration an early priority to start second term, with ICE making more than 900 arrests Sunday.

dailyNews.title: Trump Says He Wants to 'Clean Out' Gaza, Send Refugees to Egypt and Jordan
dailyNews.description: The president, calling the heavily bombed enclave “a demolition site,” proposed relocating Palestinians temporarily or long-term, a move rejected by Arab countries since the war began.

dailyNews.title: Beijing Signals Readiness to Talk to Trump's Team, Even Old Foes
dailyNews.description: The Chinese foreign minister spoke by phone with Marco Rubio, the new secretary of state who has been a critic of Beijing.

dailyNews.title: Canada Is Becoming a Fentanyl Exporter, and a Target for Trump
dailyNews.description: The drug is increasingly manufactured in and trafficked from the U.S.’s northern neighbor, though the numbers remain small compared with Mexico.
